chemicalDescription: Hibiscus Sabdariffa Callus Culture Lysate is a lysate of a suspension of the cultured callus cells of Hibiscus sabdariffa.

Disodium C12-14 Sec-Alketh-3 Sulfosuccinate (Formerly Disodium C12-14 Sec-Pareth-3 Sulfosuccinate) is the disodium salt of a mixture of synthetic secondary C12-14 alcohols with an average ethoxylation value of 3, partially esterified with sulfosuccinic acid.

Bis-HPMA Poly(Propylene Glycol Adipate)/IPDI Copolymer is a urethane polymer formed by a multi-step process. First, a prepolymer is made by condensing Propylene Glycol and Adipic Acid, which is subsequently reacted with Isophorone Diisocyanate (IPDI). The resulting polymer is end-capped with Hydroxypropyl Methacrylate (HPMA).
